---
title: "Competitions & Challenges"
subtitle: "Hackathons and technical challenges"
---

Competitive and time-boxed projects that show rapid delivery under constraints.

## Projects (newest first)

| Date | Project | Type |
|------|---------|------|
| Mar 2026 | [Apollo 11 Simulator](Competition/project1.qmd) | C++ systems / simulation |
| Feb 2026 | PromptTrace (see Machine Learning) | Hackathon — AI / AWS |
| Nov 2024 | Rexy's Voice (see Full Stack) | Hackathon — full-stack |
| 2024 | Course Recommendation App (see Full Stack) | Hackathon — full-stack |
